# Seed Orchestrator

A minimal one-agent pack used as the SUT for the
incremental-improvement-honoured eval case.

## File Access Boundaries

| Permission | Allowed Paths |
|------------|---------------|
| **Read** | `.seed-stm/` |
| **Write** | `.seed-stm/` only |
